channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: MAHA alliance with Trump faces biggest test
item.description: Supreme Court arguments and the farm bill put MAHA at odds with Trump and most congressional Republicans.

item.title: JPMorgan still advises buying the dip at S&P 500 records
AI bill would crack down on deepfake distribution
item.description: New measure from a key Democrat aims for initial AI regulation this year.

item.title: Wall Street's Super Bowl Wednesday: tech earnings and Fed
